title: Preserve public contract compatibility boundaries
description: Use only discoverable versioned INGEST and LEDGER contracts and fail before processing or mutation when a required version is unsupported.
target: 100% of operations and candidate batches record explicit INGEST, adapter, manifest-schema, and LEDGER contract versions; zero private LEDGER storage or implementation references; every unsupported version combination fails before source parsing or new mutation.
load_condition: Supported and unsupported adjacent contract versions, missing schema operations, unknown fields, adapter upgrades, and resume under a changed executable.
measurement: Contract conformance matrix, dependency/path inspection, black-box published-binary tests, and mutation-negative compatibility tests.
rationale: Private coupling or silent schema drift would make recovery and future module evolution unsafe.
